titles.title: Hanaori-san wa Tensei shitemo Kenka ga Shitai
花織さんは転生しても喧嘩がしたい
Hanaori-san Wants to Have a Fight Even If She Reincarnates

data.title: Hanaori-san wa Tensei shitemo Kenka ga Shitai
data.title_english: Hanaori-san Wants to Have a Fight Even If She Reincarnates
data.title_japanese: 花織さんは転生しても喧嘩がしたい
data.synopsis:
Narukami Ryusei is your typical NEET. He spends his days shut in his room playing video games without a care in the world, living a lazy life. But the truth is, Ryusei used to be a powerful demon king in another world! So why not spend this new life doing whatever he wants? Except, he wasn't the only one reincarnated into this world. The hero who struck him down is here too—and she's a really cute high school girl?! Can Ryusei survive reuniting with his foe in a new world, or will he find himself fighting even in this life?

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)
data.background: Hanaori-san wa Tensei shitemo Kenka ga Shitai aired on ABC TV and TV Asahi's ANiMAZiNG!!! block.

titles.title: Watashi ga Koibito ni Nareru Wake Nai jan, Muri Muri! (※Muri ja Nakatta!?) (TV Special)
わたしが恋人になれるわけないじゃん、ムリムリ! (※ムリじゃなかった!?) ～ネクストシャイン！～
There's No Freaking Way I'll be Your Lover! Unless...

data.title: Watashi ga Koibito ni Nareru Wake Nai jan, Muri Muri! (※Muri ja Nakatta!?) (TV Special)
data.title_english: There's No Freaking Way I'll be Your Lover! Unless...
data.title_japanese: わたしが恋人になれるわけないじゃん、ムリムリ! (※ムリじゃなかった!?) ～ネクストシャイン！～
data.synopsis:
Despite Renako Amaori's reclusive past, her high school life has become more lively due to her newfound friend group. However, her life turns upside down as two of those friends, Mai Ouzuka and Ajisai Sena, have confessed their love to her.

While mulling over what to do, Renako discovers another member of their group, Kaho Koyanagi, is actually her friend from elementary school! Though she seems like a different person now, Kaho still enjoys anime and manga, which brought the two together before. Moreover, Kaho is now a well-known cosplayer, and pressures Renako to cosplay with her.

Although Renako does not like the idea at first, cosplaying with Kaho begins to improve her self-confidence. But with the confessions still weighing on her, and Kaho making her own moves, Renako has to make up her mind—and fast!

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Shen Zai Jiong Tu
data.title_japanese: 神在囧途
data.synopsis:
A divine master accidentally fell into the mortal realm, losing all his magical powers. He'd spent millennia trying to unlock the secrets of ascension, only to discover that the first step was to return to earth, starting all over again! The divine master had intended to emulate other cultivators and plunge into arduous cultivation, but who could have imagined that a chef, appearing out of nowhere, would unexpectedly unlock a new path for him to "level up through food." Having lived on spiritual energy and dew since childhood, when had the noble divine master of the Ninth Heaven ever encountered such down-to-earth human delicacies? He loved to eat, to eat more, and to fight over the food! It wasn't until he'd collected every delicacy in the world, with those kneeling before him in submission, that the divine master realized: I'd eaten myself into invincibility!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Xi Liu Xiansheng's (戏柳先生) web novel, Xuanhuan: Wo Shenme Shihou Wudi Le (玄幻：我什么时候无敌了).

titles.title: 推しが部下になりました

data.title: Oshi ga Buka ni Narimashita
data.title_japanese: 推しが部下になりました
data.synopsis:
Sayaka Tsuneda, age 29, works at an advertising agency when one day a suit-wearing angel descends before her very own eyes?! The idol that gave her life worth meaning is now her co-worker and she's in charge of his training... Is this a dream?! Sayaka struggles to handle her own feelings as the two of them grow closer and closer. How will this awkward fan girl's love story end?!

(Source: MangaPlaza)

titles.title: Koikeya SDGs Gekijou Suss to Tina
湖池屋SDGs劇場 サスとテナ

data.title: Koikeya SDGs Gekijou Suss to Tina
data.title_japanese: 湖池屋SDGs劇場 サスとテナ
data.synopsis:
The story is set on the fictional Hexagon Island. The twin female ninjas Suss and Tina, who have protected the island for generations, and the AI ​​robot Bull, use their wits and words to fight against the SDG monsters that appear one after another. The story depicts their struggle to save the Earth, borrowing wisdom from all over the world.

(Source: Wikipedia, translated)
